tool.name: web_search
tool.description: Search the web using Perplexity AI (preferred) or DuckDuckGo (fallback, free, no API key needed). Automatically falls back to DuckDuckGo if Perplexity unavailable. Use use_smart_router=true for CVE/exploit/fix detection.

parameter.name: query
parameter.description: Search query or question. Be specific with technical terms and version numbers.

parameter.name: use_smart_router
parameter.description: Auto-detect CVE, exploit, and fix queries.

returns.description: Response containing success status, original query, AI-generated content, and status message.
